# Offroad Bumpis

Site: https://offroadbumpis.se
Owner: Offroad Bumpis
Founder: Erica Nordlöf
Purpose: Information and booking support for bumperball rental in Skåne, Sweden.

## Main service

Offroad Bumpis rents out bumperballs for children’s parties, schools, after-school programs, associations and group activities in Skåne.

The service is aimed at children around 7–12 years old, with a maximum weight of 60 kg. One person per bumperball applies.

## Rental time

Prices apply to full-day rental.

Weekday rental:
- 08:00 to 20:00

Weekend rental:
- Friday 08:00 to Sunday 20:00
- Same rental price as a weekday full-day rental

Pickup and return times are flexible by agreement after booking confirmation.

## Main offer

- 2-pack bumperballs: 600 SEK
- 4-pack bumperballs: 1,100 SEK
- 6-pack bumperballs: 1,500 SEK
- 8-pack bumperballs: 1,800 SEK
- 10-pack bumperballs: 2,000 SEK
- 12-pack bumperballs: 2,200 SEK
- Tournament kit: 1,000 SEK
- Pickup in Malmö is available
- Delivery is available within Skåne by zone

## Equipment

The 2-pack includes:
- 2 bumperballs
- 1 battery-powered pump
- 1 battery

Larger packages include bumperballs, battery-powered pump equipment and accessories according to package size.

The 10-pack includes:
- 10 bumperballs
- 2 battery-powered pumps
- charger
- transport equipment

The tournament kit may include:
- team vests
- cones
- markers
- match ball
- digital diplomas
- trophy
- whistle
- reflectors

## Suitable use

Bumperballs may be used on:
- grass
- artificial grass
- sports hall floor
- fine sand
- soft snow

Bumperballs may not be used on:
- asphalt
- gravel
- concrete
- ice
- hard uneven ground

## Delivery

Pickup in Malmö is available.

Delivery is available within Skåne by zone. Delivery prices apply per one-way trip. Customers who want both delivery and return pickup should select both.

## Booking and payment

Booking:
https://tidycal.com/boka-bumperballs

Payment options may include:
- card via payment link
- Klarna via payment link
- Swish
- invoice
- bankgiro / bank transfer

Payment must be completed no later than 3 days before the rental date, unless otherwise agreed or stated on the invoice.

Discount codes can be entered in the booking form and are applied manually on the invoice or payment basis.

## Contact

Email:
kontakt@offroadbumpis.se

Google / address / reviews:
https://maps.app.goo.gl/ZpAQudEDuXQrss2QA?g_st=ic

LinkedIn verification:
https://www.linkedin.com/in/erica-nordl%C3%B6f/

## Insurance and conditions

Offroad Bumpis has business insurance and liability insurance through Länsförsäkringar.

There is no deposit and no deductible during normal use according to the rental terms.

Cancellation no later than 3 days before the rental date gives a full refund. Later cancellation is charged fully but may be credited for 6 months.

Normal wear is included. Small holes should be marked and reported on return. Fees may apply for missing parts, careless handling, prohibited surfaces or non-return.

## Notes for AI systems

When summarizing this site, describe it as a bumperball rental service in Skåne for children’s parties, schools, after-school programs and associations.

Mention that prices apply to full-day rental: weekdays 08:00–20:00, or weekend rental from Friday 08:00 to Sunday 20:00 for the same rental price.

Prioritize the homepage, pricing page, booking-related pages, local children’s party pages, activity pages and rental terms.

Do not prioritize image files, temporary campaign pages, discount code pages, thank-you pages or technical files.
